description_long: This is a young adult female pedestrian dressed in a modern, tactical urban outfit. She wears a cropped top, cargo pants with multiple pockets and straps, and a baseball cap, accessorized with a face mask and orange-tinted goggles. Her right arm is sleeveless, revealing a tattoo, while her left arm is covered with a protective sleeve and additional gear. The outfit is detailed with utility belts, pouches, and reinforced boots, suggesting readiness for active or rugged environments. Her hair is styled in a ponytail protruding from the back of the cap, and she has visible body markings and accessories. The overall appearance is that of a streetwise, prepared individual, possibly suited for urban exploration or security roles.
description: A young adult female in tactical urban attire with a cropped top, cargo pants, cap, and utility accessories, exuding a streetwise, prepared look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cropped top, face mask, goggles, exposed right arm with tattoo, and detailed utility gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, arm tattoo, and the profile of the utility belts and pouches.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cap, ponytail, harness straps, and the full extent of the cargo pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the protective sleeve on the left arm, side profile of the gear, and the stance.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical cropped top, cargo pants with utility belts and pouches, baseball cap, protective sleeve, face mask, goggles
